search:spring-cloud-stream-kafka:spring.content:
- **Latest Version of Spring Cloud Stream Kafka Binder**: As of my last update, the latest version is 3.2.0.RELEASE.
  
- **CLI Commands**:
  - To create a new Spring Boot project with Spring Cloud Stream and Kafka: `mvn archetype:generate -DgroupId=com.example -DartifactId=spring-cloud-stream-kafka-demo -DarchetypeArtifactId=maven-archetype-quickstart -DinteractiveMode=false`
  
- **Key Configuration Options**:
  - `spring.cloud.stream.bindings.input.destination`: Specifies the Kafka topic for input bindings.
  - `spring.cloud.stream.bindings.output.destination`: Specifies the Kafka topic for output bindings.
  - `spring.kafka.bootstrap-servers`: The list of Kafka brokers to connect to.

- **Additional Resources**:
  - [Spring Cloud Stream Kafka Binder Reference Guide](https://docs.spring.io/spring-cloud-stream/docs/current/reference/htmlsingle/#_kafka_binder)
  - [Apache Kafka Spring Cloud Stream Integration: Complete Guide](https://www.baeldung.com/spring-cloud-stream-kafka-integration)

- **Latest Version**: Spring Cloud Stream Kafka Binder Reference Guide and Tutorial are up-to-date as of September 2025.
  
- **CLI Commands**:
  - `mvn clean install` for building projects with Maven.
  - `gradle build` for building projects with Gradle.

- **Key Config Options**:
  - `spring.cloud.stream.bindings.input.destination`: Specifies the Kafka topic to listen to.
  - `spring.cloud.stream.bindings.output.destination`: Specifies the Kafka topic to send messages to.
  - `spring.kafka.bootstrap-servers`: List of Kafka brokers.
  - `spring.kafka.consumer.group-id`: Consumer group ID for Kafka consumer.

- **Additional Resources**:
  - GitHub repository: [spring-cloud/spring-cloud-stream-samples](https://github.com/spring-cloud/spring-cloud-stream-samples)
  - Confluent Schema Registry Integration Guide: [Event-Driven Microservices with Kafka and Spring Cloud Stream](https://dev.to/confluentinc/event-driven-microservices-with-kafka-and-spring-cloud-stream-1j5b)

search:spring-cloud-stream-kafka:kafka s.content:
- **Latest Version**: Spring Boot 3.4.2, Spring Cloud Stream 3.5.0
- **Key Config Options**:
  - `spring.cloud.stream.kafka.streams.binder.configuration.commit.interval.ms=1000`
  - `spring.cloud.stream.bindings.input.destination=my-topic`
  - `spring.cloud.stream.bindings.output.destination=my-output-topic`
- **CLI Commands**:
  - `mvn clean install` to build the project
  - `./mvnw spring-boot:run` to run the application
- **Dependencies**:
  - Spring Boot Starter for Kafka Streams
  - Spring Cloud Stream Kafka Binder
- **Additional Resources**:
  - [Spring Cloud Stream Documentation](https://docs.spring.io/spring-cloud-stream/docs/current/reference/html/)
  - [Kafka Streams Documentation](https://kafka.apache.org/documentation/streams)

- **GitHub Repository**: [taoudi-abdelbasset/kafka-streams-spring](https://github.com/taoudi-abdelbasset/kafka-streams-spring)
- **Spring Cloud Stream Version**: 2025.0.0
- **Kafka Streams Version**: Latest as of the latest release
- **Spring Kafka Version**: Latest as of the latest release
- **Lombok Version**: Latest as of the latest release
- **CLI Commands**:
  - `mvn clean install` for building the project
  - `docker-compose up` to start services (if applicable)
- **Key Config Options**:
  - `spring.cloud.stream.bindings.input.destination`: Kafka topic name for input
  - `spring.cloud.stream.bindings.output.destination`: Kafka topic name for output
  - `spring.kafka.bootstrap-servers`: Kafka broker addresses
  - `spring.kafka.consumer.group-id`: Consumer group ID
- **Promo Code**: SPRINGSTREAMS200 for additional $200 of free Confluent Cloud usage
